feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >I'd like to play a game, or more accurately, i'd like you to play a game. The v…
entry.content: >I'd like to play a game, or more accurately, i'd like you to play a game. The video game industry has experienced unprecedented lay offs and financial failures from a wave of economic terrorism, /v/ >For years you've been collecting games on sale, denying publishers their rightful money, and then letting these games rot in a digital library untouched. And don't think I missed your video game piracy, costing the industry trillions of dollars in lost revenue. >I've presented you a choice. Finish

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How to make a true sonic advance 4 sequel >make sonic automatically attack enemi…
entry.content: How to make a true sonic advance 4 sequel >make sonic automatically attack enemies when he run very fast to preserve flow >give sonic a 2 hits health system to preserve difficulty. Make him recover 1 heart when he gets a certain amount of rings >Give sonic new tricks like the ability to carry enemies along with you and use them like skateboards >bring back humans and hubworlds in 2d format >forget about boost entirely and design around momentum >bring back and refine shadow the hedgehog's story

entry.title: /b/ Random: Recently ended a 20+ year friendship
entry.content: I've known this guy for 20 years. We now live relatively far apart so we didn't hang out much in person, mostly just talk on the phone or watch tv together on Discord. Within the past 2-3 years this has become something we do 5 or 6 times a week. For context I work from home and my hours are unusual. I get off work at 10pm. He doesn't work (lives on the government tit) but he does have to get up early to take his kids to school. So he calls me one night at 11 pm and I tell him sorry, I haven't f

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Siri For Older iPhones
entry.content: Apple Devs mentioned that the Siri AI is available for iPhone 15 and later devices and we can use iCloud+ Subscription to use it more on Apple’s Private Cloud Compute (PCC). So if it can run some functions on Private Cloud why not for people with older device? Or will Apple make it compatible with older devices on upcoming beta updates? Also, I noticed that other Phone companies have these features in phones that are way less powerful than iPhone 11 (Which is a oldest device support iOS 27) I te

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Childhood is thinking that you were supposed to beat a dungeon to get Nayru's Pe…
entry.content: Childhood is thinking that you were supposed to beat a dungeon to get Nayru's Pearl and that the lack of one is a sign that said dungeon was a victim of Wind Waker's famously rushed development. Adulthood is realizing that the Tower of the Gods was always going to be the third dungeon and that they decided to mix up the formula a bit by having you do the dungeon after getting the mandatory plot macguffin instead of the other way around.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /scaly/ - Scaly General
entry.content: /scaly/ - Scaly General #1656 Post lewd reptiles and discuss scaly stuff, male or female is fine. Dragons, wyverns, dinosaurs, lizards, snakes, and reptile-folk such as kobolds and Argonians are welcome, on top of other things with scales like sharks as well. Anthros, ferals and human/scaly are allowed, but please, no monstergirls. As some may take a few creative liberties on their creations, do inquire if there's a particular edge case you're unsure about. ============== >Lurking or just readin

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The h4x0rs better do this before they lose the opportunity: Arch maintainers and…
entry.content: The h4x0rs better do this before they lose the opportunity: Arch maintainers and AUR moderators/admins likely use Arch Linux. Step 1:Find identifiers belonging to any maintainer, moderator, or admin who may have control over the Arch website, repo etc. This could possibly be found in support threads, mailing lists, etc. Anything that shows a home folder name or a persistent file on their computer that lets us know whether or not we have the right person Step 2: Do your supply chain attack Step 3

entry.content: Finally got around to fitting keyless entry/central locking for muh truck >Installed lock actuators >Install cabling for negatively switched contacts >Install central locking and remote module >Doors lock and unlock with the remote and the indicators flash when doing so, ok. >Lock doors with remote >Open driver door with key >Passenger side unlocks >Dash LED keeps flashing (only flashes when doors are locked). >Press remote to lock >Doesn't lock >Press unlock then press lock on remote and doors

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You are alone and that can't change. Your consciousness will always be yours onl…
entry.content: You are alone and that can't change. Your consciousness will always be yours only. You cannot share it. You cannot let another person see things through your eyes. Your ability to perceive the world belongs only to you. Because you are the only person who can use your own consciousness to look at the world and perceive it, other people might as well not exist because their consciousness is always there alone, and this is why everyone is alone. Whatever you do, you will always be stuck with yours

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Deadly Premonition
entry.content: Just beat pic related and I want to talk about it. Note that I'm going to spoil the fuck out of the entire game so if you haven't somehow played this decade old game yet don't click this thread. No seriously, it's a great game and I'd hate to be the one to ruin it for you. >TL;DR: Proof that a bunch of negatives can make a positive when added together. I would argue not a single component works well in this game. The horror is there but it's never scary thanks to the enemies being piss-weak, inc

entry.content: life has been better, i think thats fair to say

entry.title: /b/ Random: CHAPTER TWO GOD COMES TO MEET MAN 50 By natural reason man can know God with cer…
entry.content: CHAPTER TWO GOD COMES TO MEET MAN 50 By natural reason man can know God with certainty, on the basis of his works. But there is another order of knowledge, which man cannot possibly arrive at by his own powers: the order of divine Revelation.1 Through an utterly free decision, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. This he does by revealing the mystery, his plan of loving goodness, formed from all eternity in Christ, for the benefit of all men. God has fully revealed this plan by sen

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: We went from "gaming is healing" to "gaming is too healthy" way too quick.
entry.content: We went from "gaming is healing" to "gaming is too healthy" way too quick.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >a new game is announced in a series you like during 1995 - 2010 >genuine excite…
entry.content: >a new game is announced in a series you like during 1995 - 2010 >genuine excitement and hype >a new game or remake is announced in a series you like during 2011 - today >feelings of anxiety and dread It's wild that there are entire generations of gamers that will never experience the first feel It's wild that we'll never experience the first feel again

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Sons of Anarchy
entry.content: This was good for like three seasons and then it flies off into meaningless shock value bullshit. I'm on S05e12 and almost every episode ends in a contrived fakeout cliffhanger and they keep introducing antagonists that cannot act to save their lives and come off as cringe. I wish it had ended sooner with some sort of real purpose to the characters. Did the writers get bored not expecting the show to run so long or what the fuck happened?
